lede: A look at October 6 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Bronny James and Sandra Góngora, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2025 Alberta teachers' strike
events.desc: The 2025 Alberta teachers' strike begins, leaving approximately 51,000 teachers off-work, impacting about 730,000 Albertan students.

events.title: Murder of Keith Blakelock
events.desc: Police constable Keith Blakelock is murdered as riots erupt in the Broadwater Farm suburb of London.

events.title: Anwar Sadat
events.desc: Egyptian President Anwar Sadat is murdered by Islamic extremists.

events.title: Mikoyan MiG-29
events.desc: The first prototype of the Mikoyan MiG-29, designated 9-01, makes its maiden flight.

events.title: The Jazz Singer
events.desc: Opening of The Jazz Singer, the first prominent "talkie" movie.

events.title: Turkish National Movement
events.desc: The Turkish National Movement enters Constantinople.

events.title: The 13 Martyrs of Arad
events.desc: The execution of the 13 Martyrs of Arad after the Hungarian war of independence.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: British forces capture Forts Clinton and Montgomery on the Hudson River.

events.title: Seven Years' War
events.desc: Seven Years' War: The British capture Manila from Spain and occupy it.

events.title: Transition from Sui to Tang
events.desc: Transition from Sui to Tang: Wang Shichong decisively defeats Li Mi at the Battle of Yanshi.

births.name: George Westinghouse
births.line: American engineer and businessman, founded the Westinghouse Air Brake Company (died 1914)

deaths.text: Nico van Kampen, Dutch physicist and academic
Anwar Sadat, Egyptian colonel and politician, 3rd President of Egypt, Nobel Prize laureate
Christopher Monck, 2nd Duke of Albemarle, English soldier and politician, Lieutenant Governor of Jamaica

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Marie Rose Durocher
Christian feast day: Blessed Juan de Palafox y Mendoza
Christian feast day: Mary Frances of the Five Wounds
